title: Mechanistic Synthesis: PRMP Improvement Decomposition, Gradient/Embedding Analysis, and Publication Figures
summary: Demo notebook that synthesizes evidence from 4 prior PRMP experiments into unified mechanistic evaluation. Computes mechanism decomposition (73.1% irreducible residual), gradient norm ratio analysis with Mann-Whitney test, embedding effective rank with Spearman correlation, embedding R² correlation with per-link improvement, and cross-experiment summary with Cohen's d. Produces 4 publication-ready figures and a results summary table. Uses pre-computed data from mini_demo_data.json with bootstrap CI computation (N_BOOT=100).
